We were in evening training and Kwabena went in hard for a tackle and came down badly on his knee. It's swollen up really bad now and he can't put any weight on it at all. He's sitting on the edge of the pitch, we've moved him off the grass. It doesn't look broken but the swelling is getting bigger and he's saying the pain is very serious. Can someone come and check him properly?"
narrative_ewe: "Meɖekuku, mekɔ wò fiam KNUST campus le Kumasi — nyenye Owusu, mele hall football team dzi. Míeɖo training fifia ha gbã ɣeyiɣi me, eye Kwabena yi edzi ame xɔ tackle eye ewu ƒu akpa dzedzea dzi ɔkpɔkpɔ. Afɔxɔ ŋu la ƒu dua gã sesẽ fifia eye mate ŋu ɖoa afɔ dzi o ɖe nu o. Eɖo agbele ŋutsu la ɖe pitch ƒe ɣɔ dzi — míede eŋu ƒu akpete la dzi yibob. ɣleti vɔ nyui o la, gake afɔ ŋu la ƒua na doãm, eye eɖɔ be eyi nam sesẽ ŋutɔ. Ŋutsu aɖe ate ŋu ava kpɔ eŋu nyuienyui?"
narrative_ga: Ofainɛ, mitsɛɛ shikpon ni KNUST campus Kumasi — ŋ din bi Owusu, mihe hall football team ni. Wɔyɛ evening training na Kwabena ebumo kɛɛ tackle ni, obumo waa knee eha ni. Knee no kpɛ na gbɛɛ, na enyemi le kɛ obɔ trotro le ŋ ni da mli o. Ohee pitch edge, wɔkɛ obumo grass ni amu. Enimɔ fracture shi o kɛ swelling no etsɔŋ na ehii ni — ni hii ehii mi gbɛɛ, Kwabena shi. Chale, obi bɛ je bi hee ni check no straight?
narrative_dagbani: N daa, m bɛ yɛ yi ni — m frɛ yi ka KNUST campus, Kumasi. M yuli di Owusu, n bɛ hall football team puu. Ti bɛ training yɛlim zanli, ka Kwabena naa tackle kum ka o gbini ka o nyɛri o tuuni daa wuhigu. O tuuni bee ŋmaa noŋ daa, ka o tɛ le tum tiŋ zɔŋ o din yibu kɔrigu. O chɛŋ football ground daana dabihi, ti yii o ka ti di fa zoli ka bɔri. Ka ti nyɛ kpɛŋŋu bee soli, ama noŋŋu bee wuhibu daa bɔribɔri, ka o yɛligu ka yɛligu bɔrii daa. Dimi suɣulo, nindaan o ka naa o nyɛri o tuuni noŋ kɔrigu?
narrative_fante: "Me pa wo kyew, merefrɛ wo fii KNUST campus wɔ Kumasi — me din de Owusu, meyɛ hall football team mu. Yɛreyɛ evening training na Kwabena kɔɔ in hard sɛ ɔrebɛtackle na ɔtuu fam wɔ ne kɔnkɔn so den. Ɛkyɛ yi ne kɔnkɔn aswele papa na ɔntumi ngyina so koraa. Ɔte pitch no ho, yɛde no fii grass so abrɛ aba. Ennyɛ fracture na ɛda hɔ ɛnna swelling no regyina so na ɔreka sɛ yaw a ɛyɛ no no yɛ den paa. Obi bɛtumi aba na wɔnhwɛ no yiye anaa?"
narrative_gurene: N tɩɩma, M frɛ fo Kumasi — KNUST campus kʋŋ. M yʋʋrɩ Owusu. Ti be hall football team pʋɔ. A zaamaŋa, ti be training pʋɔ, la Kwabena nɔŋ tackle yɛligu, o bɔɔrɩ o kʋŋma poore yɛligu. Wʋntɔ, o kʋŋma gʋlɩ la yɛligu nɔɔŋ — o da tɔɔrɩ a tee fam. O nyɛ football pitch tɩɩŋa deo kʋŋ — ti nɔŋ o yi grass kʋŋ. O kʋŋma da sɩŋ kpɛŋ la, la gʋlɩ bee o la yɛligu nɔɔŋ. O yɛligu ka bee o yɛligu — o yeta yɛligu ka toŋ yɛligu. Yɩna daa wa nyɛ o sɛɛ?

narrative_en: "Please, something happened in our dormitory here at Wesley Girls and I need to report it. My name is Dzifa, I'm in the same house. Two of our girls got into a bad fight — it started over a boy from Mfantsipim that both of them like, and it got physical in the corridor. The other girl hit Efua with a water bottle on the side of her head and she fell against the wall. She's awake but her neck is stiff and she keeps saying her head is pounding. We've sent the other girl away but Efua is not okay at all — she needs someone to look at her."
narrative_ewe: Meɖekuku, nudzadzra aɖe wɔa ɖe yɔyɔ ɖe afe si míele ɖe Wesley Girls, eye meɖo gbɔ na mi be mele gblɔgblɔ aɖe wɔm. Nyem ɖe Dzifa, mele ƒe maɖe si si ɖeka. Ɖevinyɔnu eve le míaƒe wò wo ŋuawo ameawo — egbɔa le ŋkeke si nubabla aɖe si le Mfantsipim zi wu wo eve wɔ nubabla dzi, eye wo wɔa nu le vɔ̃ si le ƒe ŋɔliwo dome. Nyɔnu ɖeka sia bua Efua aƒoƒo agbledela dzi le taɖevi si ku ta, eye Efua edo ƒu aƒolia dzi. Eɖo edzi la, gake ɖo le eƒe ŋu kpui kpui, eye ele gbɔ be tae yi ŋu le egbe nam nam. Míakpo nyɔnu bubuawo de, gake Efua aɖe o katã — miɖi ame si ate ŋu kpɔ eɖeke be ele teƒe ɖe a.
narrative_ga: Ofainɛ, something happen for our dormitory here for Wesley Girls, na mitse report yi. Me din dɛ Dzifa, mi le same house ɔ. Our girls ebaayi — number two — wɔ fight badly, abi? Ebi boy from Mfantsipim wɔ nyɛ cause — girls ebaayi wɔ both like ɔ guy ɔ, na oshɔ straight physical for corridor. Ɔgirl ɔ hit Efua with water bottle — right for side ni ŋmɛi ɔ — na Obumo kɛ wall. Oni le, okay, enimɔ gbɛ o — kɛ neck ɔ stiff paa, na etsɔ eba ke ŋmɛi ɔ ebuubuubu. Wagya ɔgirl ɔ away already, kɛ Efua — chale — eni okay o. Odɔ somebody fi ni na etalɛ Efua ɔ.
narrative_dagbani: "N daa, nɣa kuli timdi n kuli be Wesley Girls ka m bɛ n nyɛ yɛla dani o. N yuli la Dzifa, n bɛ yili gbɛŋ ni. Ti pɛla biɛhi ayi gbini biɛhi tum kulum — o timdi gbɛŋɣu Mfantsipim biɛla kuli bee yɔŋ la, ka ka yɔŋ din kuli timdi o. Biɛla ntooi tuu Efua ka kaɣa suɣuri yɔɔbu yɔbu, ŋun baŋ gɔli, ka o kpɛŋ dibaa ni. O nyɛ laaɣim amma o kpɔŋ yɛligu ka o bɛ yɛ ko ŋun yɛligu daa. Ti kpeni biɛla ntooi ŋmabi ka Efua boli la— o soli dɔɣite nyɛ o."
narrative_fante: Me pa wo kyew, biribi asi wɔ yen dormitory ha wɔ Wesley Girls na mehia sɛ merebu no kyerɛ. Me din de Dzifa, mewɔ house koro ara mu. Yen mmaa mmienu nya fɛw paa — ɛfii sɛ wɔ mpɛ abrantɛ baako a ɔfiri Mfantsipim, na ɛkɔɔ sɛ wɔ toaa nsa wɔ corridor mu. Obaa foforɔ no buaa Efua wɔ n'isi fa so wɔ water bottle so na ɔtuu bɔɔ ɛfam, kɔkaa faako a oguan no so. Ɔhunuu n'anya, nanso n'akɔn yɛ stiff na ɔreka daa sɛ n'isi no yɛ no yaw paa — sɛ ɛrebɔ mu te sɛ ɛrebobɔ mu. Yɛama obaa foforɔ no akɔ, nanso Efua no ho nyɛ rara — ɛhia sɛ oduruyɛfo bi bɛhwɛ no.
narrative_gurene: N tɩɩma, bʋɔrɩ bi la n'a wʋra bi n tɩ dormitory la, Wesley Girls la, ka m nyɛ sɔŋ. M yʋʋrɩ la Dzifa, m bee wʋra n tɩ yir la. Ti pɔɣa biisi ayi la kɔbɔ be — o fɔɔ la tɩ bee biig la n bɔbɔ Mfantsipim, biisi ayi la nyɛ o sɔŋ, ka dɛɛ o la korɩ wʋra la corridor. Pɔɣa bie la pɛɛra Efua a ŋuni gʋri, water bottle pɛɛ, ka o bɔɔrɩ ka o kpɛŋ nɔɔŋŋa la. O nyɛ yel sɔŋ la yɛl, ka o nyɛ yisi a o ŋuni ka a yɛligu, yɛligu, o nyɛ naa o kpɛŋ la sɔŋ. Ti lɛ tɩ pɔɣa bie kɩtaa la, ka Efua mɩɩ — o bɛri mi zɔŋ zɔŋ. O nyɛ nɩŋ nindaan n wa kɛ o la.

narrative_en: "Please, something very serious has happened at Prempeh College here in Kumasi — I am Asante, a student. My friend Kojo was trying to climb over the back wall after lights out to sneak into town, and he fell from the top and landed very badly on his leg. The leg is twisted in a way it should not be and he is crying and cannot move it at all — there is some blood too. We are afraid to move him because the leg looks very broken. Please somebody should come here quickly."
narrative_ewe: Meɖekuku, nuɖɔɖɔ gãgã aɖe wɔ ɖe Prempeh College afɔ fũ fia Kumasi — nyem Asante, eɖevi le suklu. Ŋutɔnyɔlaʋi aɖe le ŋunye, ne ŋkɔe nɔ Kojo — eɖi ɖo ƒu akɔzɔzɔ gã si le egɔme suklu ɖo si le enu, ne eyi gbɔ kple lã si dze dzi, eyata ewu ƒu, eye afɔe wo ŋu gã. Afɔa gble abe nuɖeke si maga gblee ene o abe si — eyi nam kpe, eye emate ŋu zɔ afɔa o. Dzi le etsotso kekema. Miaɖi ŋu ɖe asi le eŋu be máɖe eƒe afɔ o, elabena ɣleti la vɔ aɖee. Meɖekuku, ame aɖe na wa ɖe afɔ fũ fia gboŋgboŋ.
narrative_ga: Ofainɛ, bɔɔ ekome ni ehiɛ fɛɛ bi le Prempeh College ha Kumasi — miiyɛ Asante, student bi. Chale mi friend Kojo, lights out bii, otsɔ otse ofee back wall mli ni obumo gbɔɔ fɛɛ, oogba shi gboo ŋ he — gboo ŋ okpoko ni kaa ɔ ni ni hii nɔ, kɛ onyemi gbɔ gboo ŋ blɛ kɛ ɔkɛ o. Shwe etsotso nɔ bi too. Yɛfee ni yɛ bo ŋ kɛ gboo ŋ ehe ko fracture fɛɛ. Ofainɛ, obiara ni eba ha tweaa tweaa.
narrative_dagbani: N daa, asɛm gbɛŋ paɣa daa wuhiri ka la Prempeh College kɔŋ Kumasi yi — maa yɛliŋ Asante, ŋun student. M doo Kojo, o kɛŋa a yiɣibu ka o bɛŋ nyɛla yili doli nyɛŋ ka o kuli zaa ka o gbini, ka o tiŋ tiim ka o na. O tiŋ kɔhiri ka o tiŋ yiɣi salima ka o tiŋ laa yɛlisi la diiŋ ka ka tiim pubu. O bɛ yɛm lahi yɛlisi o tiŋ nyɔŋ, o ka yɛm lahi kuli tiŋ gbɔŋ. Ziim bee o lɛ doo. Ti nyɛ kuri ka ti bɛ yɛm sɔŋ o kuli, ka ti nyɛ ka o tiŋ yiɣi nyɛŋ waa. N daa, nyɛla nindɔɣu bi kul ti yi kɔŋ ka la bimba yiri.
narrative_fante: "Please, something very serious has happened at Prempeh College here in Kumasi — I am Asante, a student. My friend Kojo was trying to climb over the back wall after lights out to sneak into town, and he fell from the top and landed very badly on his leg. The leg is twisted in a way it should not be and he is crying and cannot move it at all — there is some blood too. We are afraid to move him because the leg looks very broken. Please somebody should come here quickly."
narrative_gurene: "Please, something very serious has happened at Prempeh College here in Kumasi — I am Asante, a student. My friend Kojo was trying to climb over the back wall after lights out to sneak into town, and he fell from the top and landed very badly on his leg. The leg is twisted in a way it should not be and he is crying and cannot move it at all — there is some blood too. We are afraid to move him because the leg looks very broken. Please somebody should come here quickly."

narrative_en: "Please, I want to report something that happened in one of the halls here at University of Ghana, Legon. My name is Nii Armah, I'm a final year student. Some senior students were initiating a fresher — Ibrahim — and it got very rough. They were hitting him on his stomach and chest repeatedly, and now he's bent over and can't stand straight, and he's saying it hurts when he tries to breathe. I stepped in and stopped it but the boy needs to be seen. Something might be wrong inside."
narrative_ewe: Meɖekuku, meɖi na wo se nutinya ŋu si wòwɔ afisia University of Ghana, Legon ha ŋu. Nyyem ŋu nye Nii Armah, menye student si le eƒe ƒe wò gbã la ŋu. Woƒe senior students ɖewo wòle Ibrahim — fresher ŋutsu ɖeka — xɔ asi le eŋu le initiation ŋu, eye nudzɔdzɔ la dze ŋu vevie hahã. Wowu Ibrahim abɔ kple ɖevi ŋɔ kpɔ kpɔ kpɔ — tɔtrɔ mɔ deka o — eye fifia exa ŋu kpɛ kpɛ ale si mate ŋu dze ɣeyiɣi akpa o. Gake eyi nam hã ke ŋu be enu ƒu agbe eƒu si ɖe. Mekpe ɖe ŋu eye mekukɔ agble la, gake ɖevi la hiã be wòkpɔ eya. Menɔa aɖe le eŋu gbã o — asim le enya be nusẽ aɖe le ŋu eme.
narrative_ga: "Ofainɛ, mɛ bi shɛ wo wɔ bii kɛ ehii wɔ halls ni wɔ University of Ghana, Legon he. Mii nyɛ Nii Armah — mɛ nyɛ final year student. Senior students bi wɔ initiate dɛbi bi — Ibrahim — naɛ shi pɛɛ rough. Wɔ bɔ ni shi kɛ gbɔɔ ko ko ko, naɛ sɛɛ oblɛ ni yɛ bent over, oni tumi gbɔ kɛ straight o — kɛ oni shɛ kɛ ni hii ŋ shi ke otɛ hɔmɔ. Mɛ kɛ gbaa shi naɛ wɔ blɛ, mɛ stop wɔ, chale — kɛ dɛbi ni lɛ ehia doctor sɛɛ. Shishi bi lɛ tɛɛ yɛ wrong niŋ shi."
narrative_dagbani: "N daa, n bɔri yɛla kuli mɔɣli maa ni, yɛla bi be University of Ghana, Legon, halls din be ŋɔ. N yuli bi Nii Armah, n gbɛŋ nyɛla final year. Puhi laaɣiri biɛba, din bi senior students, be di tuma Ibrahim — o bi fresher — ka o nyɛla doo gbinbu. Be daa o nyuli o pam ni ŋɔ ka o digindi ni ŋɔ baaŋ baaŋ, ka timma o nyɛ o daa o lakka daa, o ti palli tiɛŋ. Ka o yɛla o yɛligu din o bɔri niŋ andunia. M nini be zani ka m sɔŋ biɛla maa, ama bia maa nyɛ dɔɣite ni di di. Ŋɔ zaka din o nyɛ ka yɛla dina o kpeŋ ni."
narrative_fante: Me pa wo kyew, mepɛ sɛ meka biribi a esii wɔ hall baako mu wɔ University of Ghana, Legon ha. Me din de Nii Armah, meyɛ final year student. Senior students bi reye Ibrahim — fresher — initiation, na ɛkɔɔ so dɛ ɛyɛ rough paa. Wɔrebu no wɔ ne yafunu ne ne bruwa so daa daa, na seesei ɔbɛn ase na ɔntumi ngyina tɛtrɛtɛ, na ɔreka sɛ eye no yaw bere a ɔpɛ sɛ ɔhome. Mewɔ hɔ kɔɔ no ase na maamemaa won gyae, nanso abofra no hia sɛ oduruyɛfo bi hunu no. Ɛbɛtumi yɛ sɛ biribi yɛ no ya wɔ mu.
narrative_gurene: N tɩɩma, m bɔɔrɩ tɩ fo a yɛla nɩ da kɛ University of Ghana, Legon, pʋɔ — a yir nɩŋ biyɛ pʋɔ. M yɩɩrɩ Nii Armah, m nyɛ pɔɔ-yɛla bia a ŋmɩŋ nɩŋ. Pɔɔ-tɩŋ biisi da nɩ sɔɔ fresher a yɩɩrɩ Ibrahim — da kɛ initiation la — a la kɛ tɛɛ zaaŋ. O da naa a Ibrahim pʋʋrɛ nɛ a o tʋŋ dem pɔɔ-pɔɔ, a lala ka o bent over, a la ka o ka tɩ kpɩɩrɩ fɔrɔ. O yeta ka a nebɔ bɩ nyɛligu bɩ tɩ nyɩŋ a yɛligu. M kɛ zaŋ tʋsɩ kɛ da gbaŋ a la, a la ka Ibrahim la bia — o la ka a doctor nɩ nyɛ o. Yɛla a bʋŋ bɩ gɛsɛ ka a o pʋɔ nɩ la sɔŋ.

narrative_en: "Please, my roommate Serwa just fainted here in our room at Ashesi University. She went down and hit the side of her head on the edge of the desk when she collapsed — she's awake now but she's confused and her neck is sore. She's been doing exams preparation, barely eating or sleeping for two days now, I think that's why. The cut on her head is small and not bleeding much. I'm Nhyira, I'm her roommate — can someone come and check on her please?"
narrative_ewe: Meɖekuku, ƒometo ame Serwa ewu ƒu afi sia afime yɔm le Ashesi University. Eɖo ƒu eye ewu ta ɖeŋu dzi akɔ ŋɔ le edzi egblẽ ŋu — eɖo edzi fifia gake ele akɔ na ame, eye ɖo le eyi nam. Ele exam ŋuɖoɖo wɔwɔ me, edi ŋu ɖi nutɔ kpekpeɖeŋu — nubibiawo kpɔ eye eɖo veve wo ŋkeke eve siwo va yi ta. Mele susu be nanye yɔ wò sɔ. Gbãtõ si le ta dzi le ketsiketsi eye dzi le etsotso geɖe o. Nyenyie Nhyira — nye ƒometo ame wòm. Meɖekuku, ame kpe ɖe ŋumɔ ava kpɔe?
narrative_ga: "Ofainɛ, me roommate Serwa ebumo faint le yi ŋ room bi mli, Ashesi University. Ebumo gbɛ, naanɔ ŋmɛi bi shi ebu desk bi edge dɔɔ wɔ — oni le nɔ ŋ kɛ, bɛɛ confused nɔ fɛ, naanɔ neck bi hii ŋ. Ni yɛ exams preparation, kɛ ni mli jaa oblɛ emi food ɔ sleep akɛ days fɛɛ — mehiɛŋ bo ni yɛ sɛ ɛnyɛ amɛ. Cut bi wɔ ŋmɛi shwe tsotso le ŋ ba naa — ni ba shiŋŋ. Me yɛ Nhyira, me yɛ roommate bi — ofainɛ, nawɔ bi jɛ ko kɛ ni, chale?"
narrative_dagbani: "N daa, m roommate Serwa gbini ka o kpɛŋ ŋun nyɛŋ o daa ka o kpɛŋ ni, nyɛla ni ka bɛ be ka Ashesi University. Ka o kpɛŋ yɛla, o ŋun daa gbini desk nyɛŋ zaŋ — o nyɛ tuma daa amma o nyɛ kpɛŋ ni ka o gba yɛli nyiŋa. O nyani tɔɣim o daa. Naa, o ŋun zaŋ shɛlibu bɛ yaa din — ka ziim daa bɛ ɣeya pam. Ka bɛ bee exam tɔbi, ka o daa bɛ di daam ka bɛ nyɛ yin ayi chɛ — naa n nyɛ daa o gbini a zaŋ. N yuli Nhyira — miri o roommate. N bɛ yɛ ni, maa yaa kɔ o nyɛ la wa, sɔŋmi ma!"
narrative_fante: "Please, my roommate Serwa just fainted here in our room at Ashesi University. She went down and hit the side of her head on the edge of the desk when she collapsed — she's awake now but she's confused and her neck is sore. She's been doing exams preparation, barely eating or sleeping for two days now, I think that's why. The cut on her head is small and not bleeding much. I'm Nhyira, I'm her roommate — can someone come and check on her please?"
narrative_gurene: N tɩɩma, m room mate Serwa bɔɔrɩ ka wa ya a yɩr kʋŋ a yirba a ka a bia Ashesi University. Ka o kpɛŋ fam, o ŋun bee desk ŋɔ a zɔŋ — o nyɛ daba fɔ, la o maŋa la wʋlʋŋ ka o poore yɛligu a sʋŋ. O bee exam preparation, o ko dɩ kuri la a nyɛ yɔɣɔ ayuɔ la, m tɩɩ a la tʋma. A zɔŋ o ŋun ŋɔ, ka a kɔrɩ bilaa la, ziim bee o yɛlɛ. Mɩ yɛligu Nhyira, m yaa o room mate — N tɩɩma, ŋɔ dɔɔrɩ sɔŋ mam wa a nyɛ o?

narrative_en: "Please, I'm calling from GSTS here in Takoradi — my name is Fuseini. During our catering practical this afternoon, Selorm was lifting a pot of hot oil and he slipped and it spilled on his forearm. The skin is blistering badly and he's in a lot of pain, crying, but he's still conscious and talking. The teacher is here with him and she told me to call. Please we need to know what to do for him right now while we're getting him to the clinic."
narrative_ewe: Meɖekuku, mekpe wò nu afisia le GSTS Takoradi — ŋkɔnyé nye Fuseini. Egbe ŋdi catering practical dzidzii, Selorm trɔ pot si le abɔ dzi kple zã nu le eme, eye ewu ƒu, eye zã nu dzo le eƒe asi ŋgɔ dzi. Eƒe ɣlã le bubum kpe ɖe eƒe asi ŋgɔ dzi, eye eyi nam nuto, ele su, gake eɖo edzi, ele ƒo nu gblɔgblɔ. Ablɔɖevitɔ le eme kple eŋ, eye enye iɛ ma ŋlɔ wò. Meɖekuku, miɖi nya be míe wò nɛ atike bena míexlɛ̃ eɖe clinic aɖe na eŋ fifia.
narrative_ga: Ofainɛ, mibɔ phone fii GSTS, Takoradi — nii yɛ Fuseini. Lɛ afternoon catering practical wɔ, Selorm otsɔ pot ni shwe mli — hot oil — nɔ ebumo nɔ oil etsane wɔ ŋ forearm wei. Skin eni blistering kɛkɛ nɔ ehii ni wɔ paaa — oni kɔli kɔli, nɔ eni, nɔ oni le nɔ ekasa. Teacher eni ŋ shi, nɔ oyi mi maa mibɔ frɛ. Ofainɛ, yɛ hia shɛ oyɛ nii mli ŋ yɛfɛɛ fii, lɛ yɛ tsɔ ni clinic loo.
narrative_dagbani:
N daa, m bɛ bor la sɔŋ. M frɛ ka Takoradi, GSTS ka. M yuli din bɛ Fuseini.

Zaŋdiri ni ka ti bɛ ka catering practical — Selorm naa, o naa pam ziim zee ka o mali la yɛligu ka o ziim. O naa gbini o nuu ka yɛligu daa o ka o nii. Ka yɛligu din o daa — ka o nuuri mali la lɔɣini ka yɛligu dee o paɣa. Ama o ti soli pe — o bɛ nyɛŋ ni ka o bɛ yɛl paɣa. O sɔɣim ka bɛ kpɛn ni o ni, ka o daa n frɛ yuu ka N bori la ŋun nyɛla.

N daa, ti bori la nyɛ o sɔŋ zaŋ — ka ti guri o daa nyɛla yili na, ti nyɛ bori nyɛ a ti yɛl ti ka ti bɛ goli daa o maa.
narrative_fante: Me pa wo kyew, merefrɛ firi GSTS ha wɔ Takoradi — me din de Fuseini. Nnɛ awia catering practical mu no, Selorm rekɔ si nkukuu a emu yɛ ngo hye no, na ɔsuruu fam na ngo no hwie gu no forearm so. Ne ho nhoma no rebubuw agyaa na ɛyɛ no yaw paa — rereda na adwo da no so paa, nanso ɔte hɔ na ɔrekan asɛm. Ɔkyerɛkyerɛfo no wɔ ne ho, na ɔsoma me ma mefrɛ. Me pa wo kyew, yehia sɛ mokyerɛ yɛn deɛ yɛbɛyɛ mma no seisei ara, berɛ a yɛrɛkɔ de no kɔ clinic no mu no.
narrative_gurene: N tɩɩma, m frɛ fo a GSTS pʋɔ Takoradi — m yɛligu la Fuseini. Zaanɛ tɩ catering practical pʋɔ, Selorm sɔŋ kpaɣa yɔɔ ziim kokolike a pʋɔ, o kpɛŋ fam la o kpaɣa bɔɔrɩ, a ziim kokolike wʋb o nɩŋ deo. O piel yɛligu wʋb — o ziig bee yele, o yɛligu la a ka n nyɛ — la o bee o yele la o daana. O teacher bee ne o, o yɛligu mam la m frɛ fo. N tɩɩma — tɩ bɛri nyɛ bɛ tɩ maaŋ a Selorm zaŋ clinic, tɩ na maaŋ la tɩ tʋʋmɩ bɛ ne o yɛ?
